title: Multicolor Mini Unicorn Pinata (18cm x 17cm) 1 Piece - Perfect Party Game and Decoration for an Enchanting Experience, standard size
features: CAPTURE THE MAGIC OF UNICORNS: Make your celebration extra enchanting with our multicolor mini unicorn pinata, measuring 18cm x 17cm, the perfect size for any party game or decoration.
VIBRANT MULTICOLOR DESIGN: Dazzle your guests with our eye-catching, multicolored unicorn pinata, adding a splash of whimsy charm to your special event.
ONE CHARMING PIECE: This 1-piece mini unicorn pinata makes setup and cleanup a breeze, giving you more time to enjoy the festivities with your loved ones.
UNFORGETTABLE PARTY EXPERIENCE: Create delightful memories and immerse guests in a fairytale atmosphere with this charming addition to birthday parties, baby showers, or any magical gathering.

PERFECT HIT TO YOUR CELEBRATION: Elevate your event with this fun and engaging party game, ensuring your guests have a spellbinding time while trying to release those sweet treasures hidden inside the mini unicorn pinata.
description: From the manufacturer Mini Unicorn Pinata Favour Decoration Treat someone special to our adorable mini Unicorn pinata favour decoration. A great surprise for any Unicorn-lover, this 6.5-Inch Unicorn favour container features a flap on top that opens so you can fill it with sweets. Award the Unicorn to a lucky guest at your Unicorn birthday party, or hand them out as favours! This Unicorn decoration also makes a super cool centrepiece to arrange on your table. Shop the rest of our Unicorn themed party supplies to complete your celebration. Please note that this mini pinata is intended as a table decoration or party favour, not as a traditional pinata which would be hung from a ceiling and hit with a pinata buster to break open. 1 Mini Unicorn Pinata Favour Decoration Mini pinata favour measures 17.5cm x 18.4cm x 6.4cm (6.9" x 7.2" x 2.5") Ideal table decoration or favour box for a Unicorn theme party Fill with sweets and small party favours Combine with other Unicorn Birthday party supplies from Unique Party
